This song got me out of a long period of burying my feelings and numbing myself with drugs and alcohol to the point I was starting to become borderline sociopathic, took some MDMA with friends and when I got home I listened to Snuff like 5 times on a loop and just let all of the pain and sadness I had been burying for years at that point out and it was the most freeing feeling of my life, after that I started consciously working really hard towards being more in touch with my feelings and expressing them more often and my mental health skyrocketed.

After being translated and interpreted, the song Dead Memories has meaning or tells the story of the heartache experienced by Corey Taylor (slipknot vocalist) for his idol woman. The pain seemed to haunt Corey's mind. So to continue living, Corey seems to want thoughts about his love story to die, memories of his love story to die and memories of his story to die (Dead Memories), in Corey's heart.
